dev.jeka.core.api.utils

Class JkUtilsZip

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.utils.JkUtilsZip

  • public final class JkUtilsZip
extends java.lang.Object
    Low level utility method to deal with zip files.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static void expandTarGz(java.nio.file.Path tarGzFile, java.nio.file.Path target) 
      static java.util.List<java.util.zip.ZipEntry> getZipEntries(java.util.zip.ZipFile zipFile)
      Returns all zip entry of the specified zip file.
      static java.util.zip.ZipFile getZipFile(java.io.File file)
      Creates a ZipFile to file without checked exception.
      static java.util.jar.JarFile jarFile(java.nio.file.Path path) 
      static void unzip(java.nio.file.Path zipFile, java.nio.file.Path target) 
      static void unzipUrl(java.lang.String url, java.lang.String zipSubPath, java.nio.file.Path target)
      Unzips the contents of a URL to a specified target path.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    • Method Detail

      • getZipEntries

        public static java.util.List<java.util.zip.ZipEntry> getZipEntries(java.util.zip.ZipFile zipFile)
        Returns all zip entry of the specified zip file.

      • getZipFile

        public static java.util.zip.ZipFile getZipFile(java.io.File file)
        Creates a ZipFile to file without checked exception.

      • jarFile

        public static java.util.jar.JarFile jarFile(java.nio.file.Path path)

      • unzipUrl

        public static void unzipUrl(java.lang.String url,
                            java.lang.String zipSubPath,
                            java.nio.file.Path target)
        Unzips the contents of a URL to a specified target path.
        Parameters:
        url - The URL of the zip file to be unzipped.
        zipSubPath - The subpath within the zip file to be unzipped. Pass null or empty string to unzip the entire zip file.
        target - The destination path where the unzipped files will be copied to.

      • unzip

        public static void unzip(java.nio.file.Path zipFile,
                         java.nio.file.Path target)

      • expandTarGz

        public static void expandTarGz(java.nio.file.Path tarGzFile,
                               java.nio.file.Path target)
